home.headline: EMRAKEL Burger House
home.description: A modern burger house with a sharp black-and-white identity, premium comfort food, and a clean visual system ready for future admin-managed menu photos.

items.name: Classic House Burger
items.description: Grilled beef, cheddar, house sauce, pickles, sesame bun.

items.name: Smoky Double Burger
items.description: Double patty, caramelized onion, smoked sauce, crisp lettuce.

items.name: House Margherita
items.description: Mozzarella, tomato, basil, olive oil, crisp house crust.

items.name: Pepperoni House Pizza
items.description: Pepperoni, mozzarella, oregano, and a rich tomato base.

items.name: Citrus House
items.description: Orange, lemon, house syrup, and a clean bright finish.

items.name: Black Label Martini
items.description: Smooth, chilled, citrus edge, and a sharp lounge presentation.
